feed.title: Applied Linguistics Review
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Applied Linguistics Review (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Exploring the role of task-based goal orientations and control-value appraisals in Chinese as a second language writing performance
entry.summary: Authors: Haijing Zhang, Fangwei Huang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2025-0094 Pages: Page range: 1449-1476

entry.summary: Authors: Guangxiang Leon Liu, Prem Phyak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2024-0068 Pages: Page range: 1477-1502

entry.summary: Authors: Zixuan Cheng, Peijian Paul Sun DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2025-0057 Pages: Page range: 1503-1533

entry.title: Emerging conventions in GenAI disclosure: how applied linguistics scholars disclose AI use

entry.title: Fostering flow experience in foreign language learning: examining synergetic effects of expectancy-value beliefs and emotions
entry.summary: Authors: Wei Sun, Hong Shi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2024-0194 Pages: Page range: 1563-1599

entry.summary: Authors: Feng (Kevin) Jiang, Ken Hyland DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2025-0188 Pages: Page range: 1601-1630

entry.summary: Authors: Adrian Pablé DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2024-0353 Pages: Page range: 1631-1653

entry.summary: Authors: Inés de la Viña, Gloria Chamorro, Christina S. Kim DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2024-0376 Pages: Page range: 1783-1809

entry.title: Harnessing translanguaging pedagogy: evidence from Ukrainian refugee learners constructing inclusive learning environments in EMI science education at a Polish university
